name: NewLimit raised Series C funding to bring longevity medicines to human trials
summary: NewLimit announced a $435 million Series C financing tied to moving aging reprogramming medicines toward human clinical trials.
significance_note: Shows substantial financing and clinical-transition intent around aging reprogramming medicines. It is activity-only until registry or study records are separately reviewed.

surface_routing.rationale: The financing is current field activity and a potential clinical-transition signal, but any trial or efficacy implications require separate registry/evidence review.
